_meta.note: Deterministic torture corpus for the Lens edge harness. Regenerate with: python tests/edge/generate_corpus.py

data_notes: Only 41 of 142 frozen tickers carry >= 30 daily closes; the rest resolve to slope 'none' / vol 0 / beta 1.0. 'data-insufficient-history' exploits that real gap (KO/PG/JNJ) instead of a synthetic ticker, so it stays fully offline.

A genuinely SHORT-but-nonempty series (e.g. exactly 29 closes) cannot be built without editing the frozen cache, which would change parity inputs; the min-data-points path is instead reached via the no-usable-history tickers above.

True yfinance NaN/inf response rows (CLAUDE.md section 6) live in the main.py HTTP layer, not the analyze pipeline; 'data-nan-inf-stress' exercises the closest analyze-side path (extreme unrealized %) rather than a fabricated bar.

Exact on-threshold vol/beta/slope values are not dialable from a fixed price series; those boundary entries use the nearest real full-history ticker and note the intended band. Concentration and performance boundaries ARE exact.

portfolios.label: empty portfolio
portfolios.targets: positions=[] -> documented empty-result shape

portfolios.label: single position (whole book)
portfolios.targets: 1 holding == 100% weight

portfolios.label: two positions
portfolios.targets: 2 holdings, 50/50

portfolios.label: all one sector (Technology), clean names
portfolios.targets: single-sector book -> concentration sector-count escalation

portfolios.label: healthy 3-fund index portfolio (should NOT nag)
portfolios.targets: SPY+VXUS+SCHD, all index ETFs -> index-dominance downgrade, no high/critical

portfolios.label: single broad-market index fund
portfolios.targets: 100% SPY -> index informational hold, quiet

portfolios.label: broadly diversified 10-sector clean book
portfolios.targets: 10 sectors ~even -> should be healthy/quiet

portfolios.label: single-stock weight exactly 30% (regular moderate threshold)
portfolios.targets: weight==30.0% -> strict-'>' means still the band BELOW moderate

portfolios.label: single-stock weight 30.5% (just over moderate threshold)
portfolios.targets: weight just over 30.0% -> should classify moderate

portfolios.label: single-stock weight exactly 40% (regular high threshold)
portfolios.targets: weight==40.0% -> strict-'>' means still the band BELOW high

portfolios.label: single-stock weight 40.5% (just over high threshold)
portfolios.targets: weight just over 40.0% -> should classify high

portfolios.label: single-stock weight exactly 50% (regular critical threshold)
portfolios.targets: weight==50.0% -> strict-'>' means still the band BELOW critical

portfolios.label: single-stock weight 50.5% (just over critical threshold)
portfolios.targets: weight just over 50.0% -> should classify critical

portfolios.label: volatility just over regular high (PLTR ~51.8%)
portfolios.targets: PLTR vol 51.8 > regular high 50 at >15% weight -> vol sell

portfolios.label: volatility in moderate band (F ~36.7%)
portfolios.targets: F vol 36.7 in (35,50] -> moderate, no flag

portfolios.label: beta just over regular high (F ~1.29 vs 1.3)
portfolios.targets: F beta 1.29 sits right under regular high 1.3

portfolios.label: one position ~99.99% of the book
portfolios.targets: dominant >50% single stock -> trim path, not buy-to-dilute

portfolios.label: unrealized loss exactly -15% (regular moderate edge)
portfolios.targets: return==-15 -> strict-'<' means NOT yet moderate

portfolios.label: sub-2% odd-lot worth ~$26 (just over $25 floor)
portfolios.targets: weight<2% and value>$25 -> dead_weight sell (regular/high)

portfolios.label: sub-2% odd-lot worth ~$20 (below $25 floor)
portfolios.targets: penny stub below dead-weight floor -> must NOT be sold

portfolios.label: fractional penny position
portfolios.targets: 0.0005 shares of AMC (~$0.0008) -> near-zero weight

portfolios.label: holding whose sector resolves to Unknown (GOOG)
portfolios.targets: GOOG not in TICKER_SECTOR, sector omitted -> Unknown bucket

portfolios.label: malformed/garbage sector string
portfolios.targets: sector='Blahsector' -> normalize keeps it, used as a real sector

portfolios.label: positions missing name / sector / added_at
portfolios.targets: optional fields omitted -> engine must fill defaults

portfolios.label: holdings with < min-data-points 1y/6mo history
portfolios.targets: KO/JNJ/JPM have no usable frozen history -> slope none, vol 0, beta 1.0; three distinct sectors so it stays genuinely quiet

portfolios.label: a position with price 0 (and zero current value)
portfolios.targets: price==0 -> current value 0, weight math must not divide-by-0

portfolios.label: a position with 0 shares
portfolios.targets: shares==0 -> zero value, entry_price div-guard

portfolios.label: a malformed position with NEGATIVE shares
portfolios.targets: shares<0 -> negative weight; stresses weight-sum & finite checks

portfolios.label: an absurdly large share count
portfolios.targets: 1e12 shares -> very large equity; stresses caps & finite outputs

portfolios.label: extreme-magnitude entry price (unrealized overflow bait)
portfolios.targets: near-zero cost basis -> +huge unrealized %; performance/finite stress

portfolios.label: settings omit risk_tier entirely
portfolios.targets: no risk_tier -> load_risk_profile default 'regular'

portfolios.label: settings name an unknown risk_tier
portfolios.targets: risk_tier='ferocious' -> unknown -> fallback 'regular' (Tier-C .get)

portfolios.label: explicit risk_tier=low on a risky book
portfolios.targets: exercise low thresholds + sell suppression

portfolios.label: explicit risk_tier=regular on a risky book
portfolios.targets: exercise regular thresholds + sell suppression

portfolios.label: explicit risk_tier=high on a risky book
portfolios.targets: exercise high thresholds + sell suppression

portfolios.label: single-stock concentration -> none (weight 15%)
portfolios.targets: KO weight 15.0% -> concentration severity none

portfolios.label: single-stock concentration -> low (weight 25%)
portfolios.targets: KO weight 25.0% -> concentration severity low

portfolios.label: single-stock concentration -> moderate (weight 35%)
portfolios.targets: KO weight 35.0% -> concentration severity moderate

portfolios.label: single-stock concentration -> high (weight 45%)
portfolios.targets: KO weight 45.0% -> concentration severity high

portfolios.label: single-stock concentration -> critical (weight 55%)
portfolios.targets: KO weight 55.0% -> concentration severity critical

portfolios.label: unrealized loss -> low (-10%)
portfolios.targets: AAPL unrealized -10.0% -> performance severity low

portfolios.label: unrealized loss -> moderate (-22%)
portfolios.targets: AAPL unrealized -22.0% -> performance severity moderate

portfolios.label: unrealized loss -> high (-40%)
portfolios.targets: AAPL unrealized -40.0% -> performance severity high

portfolios.label: unrealized loss -> critical (-60%)
portfolios.targets: AAPL unrealized -60.0% -> performance severity critical

portfolios.label: force a volatility SELL CTA
portfolios.targets: OPEN vol 143 crit at 40% weight -> priority-2 sell

portfolios.label: force a steep-decline SELL CTA
portfolios.targets: UEC slope -80 crit at 30% weight -> priority-1 sell

portfolios.label: force buy-to-diversify from single-stock concentration
portfolios.targets: AAPL 45% (high) clean -> priority-6 buy_new suggestions

portfolios.label: force a reduce-beta BUY CTA
portfolios.targets: high-beta book (SOXL/TQQQ) -> priority-5 buy low-beta name

portfolios.label: multiple sub-2% odd-lots -> dead-weight sells
portfolios.targets: 3 tiny lots (<2%, >$25) -> priority-8 dead_weight sells (reg/high)

portfolios.label: dangerous book on conservative tier (sells blocked)
portfolios.targets: low tier + declining large caps -> suppressed sells, high floor

portfolios.label: 78% in a leveraged ETF (deposit-into-fire trap)
portfolios.targets: SOXL 78% crit vol/beta -> trim, never buy-to-dilute

portfolios.label: book that is wholly in crisis
portfolios.targets: 5 critical-vol names even weight -> danger gate, no buys

portfolios.label: runaway winner that drifted up
portfolios.targets: AAPL up 220% -> >2x drift at >30% weight -> rebalance

portfolios.label: risk book that may invert tier caution ordering
portfolios.targets: per-tier sell_scale (0.10/0.50/0.25) vs risk floor -> ordering

portfolios.label: all-high (not critical) severity book across tiers
portfolios.targets: high-severity names -> danger half-weight; tier ordering

portfolios.label: mid-cap decliners, moderate weights, all tiers
portfolios.targets: sell-driven caution may peak at regular tier

portfolios.label: 60% in an Unknown-sector name (GOOG)
portfolios.targets: heavy sector Unknown -> exclude set empty -> buy targeting

portfolios.label: Unknown-sector cluster dominates the book
portfolios.targets: CLSK/MARA/RIOT all Unknown -> heaviest 'sector' is Unknown

portfolios.label: GOOG + GOOGL (same issuer, split sector accounting)
portfolios.targets: one class Unknown, one Comm Services -> sector double-count

portfolios.label: 55% high-vol name (trim vs risk-sell contest)
portfolios.targets: SOXL 55% crit vol -> priority-6 trim must beat the vol sell

portfolios.label: dominant drifted winner on conservative tier
portfolios.targets: low tier + >50% winner -> trim path bypasses sell floor

portfolios.label: single stock just over 50% -> possibly small trim
portfolios.targets: 51% single stock -> priority-6 trim near the rounding/floor edge

portfolios.label: sector over-concentration with most sectors held
portfolios.targets: 8 sectors held + heavy Tech -> limited underweight room
